metadata.title: Casa di Lusso | Premium Tableware & Vintage Collections
metadata.description: Curated luxury tableware, premium porcelain, European brands and exclusive vintage pieces for elegant living.
metadata.ogAlt: Casa di Lusso premium table setting

hero.title: Casa di Lusso
hero.lead: Curated luxury tableware and timeless vintage pieces for elegant living.

story.kicker: European table culture, selected with restraint.
story.title: Table Setting as an Art
story.body: Casa di Lusso curates modern serving pieces, collectible porcelain and refined vintage finds for tables that feel personal, composed and quietly memorable.
story.note: We sell the atmosphere around the table: proportion, texture, heritage and the small rituals that make a home feel collected.

collections.title: Objects chosen for presence, balance and provenance.
collections.body: From contemporary glassware to rare porcelain services, every selection is treated like an interior detail: proportion, finish, color and atmosphere matter.

why.title: Quiet luxury, handled with obsessive care.

curated.title: Carefully Curated Collections
curated.text: Every piece is chosen for proportion, condition, finish and the way it lives on a table.

vintage.title: Authentic Vintage Pieces
vintage.text: Limited pieces with history, character and the quiet drama of proper table culture.

brands.title: Premium European Brands
brands.text: Original tableware, glassware and porcelain from established European houses.

delivery.title: Worldwide Delivery
delivery.text: Careful packing and coordinated delivery across Uzbekistan, CIS and selected international routes.

trust.title: Every fragile detail is treated seriously.

brands.title: A restrained wall of European tableware names.

gallery.title: Table scenes with the mood of an old European apartment.
gallery.body: Explore styling references, vintage finds and modern table accents curated for elegant living.

beforeAfter.title: From ordinary table to a composed Casa di Lusso setting.
beforeAfter.beforeText: Functional pieces without a clear rhythm or emotional focal point.
beforeAfter.afterText: Layered porcelain, glass, metallic accents and vintage details arranged with editorial restraint.

testimonials.title: Trusted by people who care how a table feels.

madina.quote: Casa di Lusso found a porcelain set that felt collected, not simply purchased. The table changed completely.
madina.name: Madina R.

daniel.quote: The curation is elegant and precise. We received options that matched our interior palette and service style.
daniel.name: Daniel K.

lola.quote: Beautiful vintage pieces, careful packing and a very calm, premium consultation from the first message.
lola.name: Lola A.

delivery.question: Delivery
delivery.answer: Delivery in Tashkent is arranged individually. Regional and international orders are packed carefully and shipped through trusted carriers.

payment.question: Payment
payment.answer: Orders are confirmed with prepayment. Final payment terms are agreed before dispatch, depending on item availability and route.

authenticity.question: Authenticity
authenticity.answer: We work with original branded pieces and disclose vintage condition before purchase, including visible marks or age-related details.

returns.question: Returns
returns.answer: Returns are reviewed individually. Fragile and vintage pieces require condition verification before approval.

packaging.question: Packaging
packaging.answer: Fragile pieces are wrapped, stabilized and packed for their route, with extra protection for porcelain, crystal and vintage objects.

contact.title: Let us curate your next table setting.
contact.body: Send a reference, ask for availability or request a private selection of modern and vintage tableware.

footer.copyright: Copyright 2026 Casa di Lusso. Curated luxury tableware and vintage collections.
